race_name: L'Etape Poland by Tour de France

top_categories.workout_context: L'Etape Poland by Tour de France's tatra mountain roadshell crusher forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 52 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic L'Etape Poland by Tour de France's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before September.
5,077ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
97ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
At L'Etape Poland by Tour de France, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of L'Etape Poland by Tour de France. Train it until it feels boring.
5,077ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
52 miles on tatra mountain roadshell crusher burns energy faster than the distance suggests. Train the fade resistance now.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At L'Etape Poland by Tour de France, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on tatra mountain roadshell crusher. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
Low-cadence force work for 5,077ft of climbing. The slow, grinding ascents where you can't spin—you push.
Base fitness for L'Etape Poland by Tour de France. Without this, the hard workouts break you down instead of building you up.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 40–60g carbs/hour for L'Etape Poland by Tour de France’s 52 miles. Front-load calories in the first half. One bottle per hour minimum, more in heat.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at L'Etape Poland by Tour de France. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at L'Etape Poland by Tour de France requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on tatra mountain roadshell crusher to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Gravel Specific, Race Simulation, and VO2max to prepare you for 52 miles of tatra mountain roadshell crusher in Zakopane, Lesser Poland Voivodeship, Poland.
